pages.title: Low-tier brawl
pages.text: $(l)心 → 忍 → 力$()$(br2)Good for wood to iron. 力 gives offense, but not enough defense, so 心 and 忍 keep you alive long enough to hit back.

pages.title: High-tier pressure
pages.text: $(l)心 → 救 → 忍 → 净 → 怒$()$(br2)Good for diamond and above. 救 prevents sudden death, 忍 splits burst, 净 cleans debt, 怒 grows once you can stay alive.

pages.title: Escape line
pages.text: $(l)稳 → 隐 → 息$()$(br2)稳 keeps you from being thrown off position, 隐 breaks attention, 息 repairs hunger or health once you are actually clear.
